---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the Visitor Registration System
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ""
---

## 🚀 Feature Request

### Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is.
Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

### Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Describe Alternatives You've Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Use Case

Describe the use case for this feature:

- **Who** will use this feature? [e.g., Security guards, Residents, Admins]
- **When** will they use it? [e.g., During check-in, When approving invitations]
- **How** will they use it? [e.g., Via mobile app, At the gate kiosk]

### UI/UX Mockups

If applicable, add mockups or wireframes:

```
[Describe or paste mockup here]
```

### API Changes

If this feature requires API changes:

```
Endpoint: /api/v1/...
Method: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE
Request: {...}
Response: {...}
```

### Database Changes

If this feature requires schema changes:

```prisma
model Example {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  // New fields here
}
```

### Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

### Priority

- [ ] Critical — Blocks core functionality
- [ ] High — Important for production use
- [ ] Medium — Nice to have, improves experience
- [ ] Low — Minor enhancement

### Additional Context

Add any other context, links to related issues, or references here.
